title: Vanilla++
description: Vanilla++ is a mod that aims to add various blocks and items to the game, while still keeping the vanilla feel.
body:
# Vanilla++
It's a mod that aims to add various blocks and items to the game, while still keeping the vanilla feel. It is a work in progress, and will be updated frequently.

## Added slabs
![Slabs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheFusion21/vanilla-plus-plus/refs/heads/master/screenshots/slabs.png)

## Added vertical slabs
![Vertical slabs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheFusion21/vanilla-plus-plus/refs/heads/master/screenshots/vertical_slabs.png)

## Added horizontal glass panes
![Horizontal glass panes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheFusion21/vanilla-plus-plus/refs/heads/master/screenshots/horizontal_glass_panes.png)

## Added shelfs
![Shelfs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheFusion21/vanilla-plus-plus/refs/heads/master/screenshots/shelfs.png)

## Added pressure plates
![Pressure plates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheFusion21/vanilla-plus-plus/refs/heads/master/screenshots/pressure_plates.png)

## Added items
![Items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheFusion21/vanilla-plus-plus/refs/heads/master/screenshots/items.png)

## Added Rails
![Rails](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheFusion21/vanilla-plus-plus/refs/heads/master/screenshots/rails.png)
